message:
fix(gc): replace bare arithmetic with saturating_add to prevent integer overflow

Replace all += and + arithmetic in ExtensionHeap and GcCollector with
saturating_add for next_id, total_bytes, total_reclaimed, collection_count,
and event_sequence. Add a pre-flight guard to collect_tracked that returns
early with HeapNotFound or DomainError before touching the heap if
preconditions fail, ensuring heap state and event log are not mutated on
error. New integration tests verify the no-mutation contract in both
primary and enrichment suites.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
